name: @ont/node-live
description: ONT go-live shared live-runtime surface. App-runtime policy for live Bitcoin wiring that is NOT consensus and NOT a pure adapter: today, the chain-safety gate (parse ONT_CHAIN, allow only regtest|signet, reject unset/main/mainnet/test, and assert the node's chain before any poll/broadcast wiring is constructed). @ont/bitcoin keeps the low-level assertBitcoinRpcChain; this owns the runtime policy around it so indexer + publisher cannot drift.
